name: North Carolina: Eastern Rub and Sauce
recipeInstructions:
For the rub, mix all ingredients together until well combined. Apply the rub generously to meat and allow it to set for at least 30 minutes before cooking.
For the sauce, combine equal parts white vinegar and cider vinegar in a bowl. Add sugar, red pepper flakes, Tabasco sauce, and black pepper. Whisk or stir until smooth and all ingredients are fully incorporated.
